beats.vo_text: I worked fifty years and retired with nothing.
beats.staged_action: the man sits alone at the kitchen table at dawn, hands folded around a cooling cup

beats.vo_text: Nobody told me that saving early was the real currency.
beats.staged_action: the man walks through a quiet market, stalls half-empty

beats.vo_text: I tried to catch up, but compound interest waits for no one.
beats.staged_action: the man sits at a desk with papers spread out, rubbing his temples

beats.vo_text: Then I learned: the best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.
beats.staged_action: the man opens a small notebook and writes a number, determined expression

beats.vo_text: Save before you spend. Even a little. Even now.
beats.staged_action: the man places a few coins into a jar on the kitchen shelf

beats.vo_text: Start today. Your future self will thank you.
beats.staged_action: the man steps out into warm morning light, face lit with quiet resolve
